Interface IErrorFeatureContainer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return error features.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("27C444DC-25EE-41FF-A2BD-C69B6343A6C3")]
public interface IErrorFeatureContainer

Properties

ErrorFeature[ISpatialReference, esriTopologyRuleType, esriGeometryType, int, long, int, long]

An error feature with that matches the passed in parameters.

ITopologyErrorFeature ErrorFeature[ISpatialReference SpatialReference, esriTopologyRuleType errorType, esriGeometryType GeometryType, int OriginClassID, long OriginOID, int DestinationClassID, long DestinationOID] { get; }

Parameters

SpatialReference ISpatialReference
errorType esriTopologyRuleType
GeometryType esriGeometryType
OriginClassID int
OriginOID long
DestinationClassID int
DestinationOID long

Property Value

ITopologyErrorFeature

ErrorFeatures[ISpatialReference, ITopologyRule, IEnvelope, bool, bool]

An enumeration of error features that match the passed in parameters.

IEnumTopologyErrorFeature ErrorFeatures[ISpatialReference SpatialReference, ITopologyRule Rule, IEnvelope Extent, bool Errors, bool Exceptions] { get; }

Extent IEnvelope

Exceptions bool
